title: Jowel Islam Habib
description: Frontend-focused developer transitioning into full-stack MERN development, with a strong foundation in building scalable and user-centric web applications. Experienced in JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, Next.js, and REST API integration, with a focus on clean architecture and component-driven UI design. Backed by 3+ years of professional experience in CMS infrastructure and production deployment. Passionate about leveraging Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and modern frontend technologies to create seamless digital experiences. Actively seeking opportunities to contribute, grow, and deliver impactful products as a Junior MERN Stack or Frontend Developer.
